properties.name: The Stone Lion
properties.desc: Local pub with 2 patios with TVs for events, 1 heated & covered, plus a menu of comfort food.

properties.name: The Wolfe Tone Irish Pub
properties.desc: Irish pub with an enclosed patio and many TVs for events, with a menu and bar filled with Irish classics.

properties.name: Castro's Lounge
properties.desc: Cask & draft microbrews, plus a big selection of bottles, in an intimate bar with vegetarian grub.

properties.name: The Druid Bar
properties.desc: A new Irish pub with a dynamic interior, for lovers of Irish cuisine and pints, and great for catching up with friends in an intimate setting.

properties.name: Outrigger
properties.desc: Casual, arty grill featuring a jumbo menu with breakfast & diverse American eats, plus a patio.

properties.name: The Hide Out On The Beach
properties.desc: A local pub great for listening to music and singing your heart out to karaoke on Thursdays.
